text: While we need to help there is a limit to our ability to help. We need systems in place that help countries like Mexico so that their citizens don't feel the absolute need to flee to the US, instead of treating the problem of immigration, we need to start at the reason for the citizen fleeing. I want the democratic party to recognize this and start at the source instead of treating the symptoms.

It seems like the democratic party is concerned with what the middle class endures. We need universal health care with no discrimination for preexisting conditions, education funding, racial equality, equal rights for women, and we need to help the poor, sick, and hungry as well as the refugees.

It seems they are more geared towards helping corporations and the rich. I don't see how they have any interest at all in the middle class or poor. Why would they want to get rid of ACA? It removed preexisting conditions, which was huge. They seem geared towards keeping the white male in charge of everything including women's bodies, civil rights, etc.
